textByHash.686dd17610a17e6e6123fde6ea8377f679769f38: Thanks, me very careful about looks!
textByHash.f7d50fda05558a38979100d7551d35c02e011593: It ok, I with Arrg, he very strong and mighty but sometimes...
textByHash.eb72b1ae207ba720fd7795a44b3f8656c3f6a1ea: I not know if he love Aga, He say he will show he love by bringing me flower Trollweiss.
textByHash.a205b68b91ff7efb799f328f14e1c166696b1b2a: It a very rare, beautiful flower, it very special!
textByHash.30a1079377408326722b5a770a1a970c8d2e673c: It grow somewhere in these mountains.
textByHash.0aa81e54290369ecec07ed8c4fed33191f77acb3: He very strong, if he love Aga he will get Trollweiss.
textByHash.a24e95a69aa111cc83e9848b1652125edb55ff5f: Aga can't wait for Trollweiss. Arrg will show his love!
textByHash.ab8b1efae10d94e8f48870f4f8e7ac6ffa1ce830: Thanks for getting Aga and Ug happy. Without you Ug too shy, Aga so in love with Ug!
